title: Fix 10 easy bugs + write tests
objective: Fix critical JSON schema types, add missing permissions, fix concurrency bugs, SQL injection, and write verification tests
scope: ToolDefinitions, GeminiMeetingService, GeminiLiveClient, AudioRecorder, CameraCaptureHelper, MemoryDbHelper, GoogleDriveServiceHelper, DocumentSelector, AndroidManifest, XML resources
completed: ToolDefinitions: lowercase all JSON schema types (OBJECT→object, STRING→string, INTEGER→integer, ARRAY→array)
GeminiMeetingService: lowercase all JSON schema types
AndroidManifest: add POST_NOTIFICATIONS permission for API 33+
MemoryDbHelper: add ORDER BY last_accessed_time DESC to getMemoryList
MemoryDbHelper: escape % and _ wildcards in searchMemories LIKE query
GoogleDriveServiceHelper: escape single quotes to prevent SQL injection in Drive API queries
Write ToolDefinitionsUnitTest.kt: 5 unit tests for type casing, uniqueness, required params
Write BugFixVerificationTest.kt: 9 AndroidJUnit4 tests verifying all fixes

artifacts.description: Unit tests for ToolDefinitions JSON schema
Integration tests verifying all bug fixes

knowledge: Gemini API requires lowercase JSON Schema types (object, string, integer) — uppercase types silently ignored
Google Drive API query strings need single quotes escaped by doubling ('' → )
SQLite LIKE wildcards % and _ must be escaped when searching user-provided strings
@Volatile annotation ensures visibility of flags across threads in Kotlin
next_steps: Fix remaining top-priority bugs: ProGuard -repackageclasses, MeetingActivity ANR, FloatingWidgetService startForeground, NotificationListener privacy, deferred.await() timeout, Channel(UNLIMITED) OOM, AudioRecorder SIGSEGV, CameraCaptureHelper race
context_summary: Fixed 11 bugs + added 2 test files. Working tree has all changes staged for commit. Remaining 8 high-priority bugs from the code review still need fixes.
